goal: Read the contents of test_daemon.ps1, fix syntax errors, and save it back to the vault.

tasks.instruction: Use execute_command to locate 'test_daemon.ps1' (e.g., using Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter test_daemon.ps1) and read its contents with Get-Content. Return the script text.

Analyze the script text retrieved in t1. Fix any syntax errors (such as missing parentheses, string terminators, or typos), and use save_script to save the corrected code back to the vault as 'test_daemon.ps1'.
